_comment: VVV Digitals Store — dependencies to add to your existing vvvdigitals.com package.json
_notes: If your existing vvvdigitals.com project already has react-router-dom, skip that one.
Netlify Functions run in Node — no bundler needed for them.
For local dev, install netlify-cli globally: npm install -g netlify-cli, then run `netlify dev` instead of `npm run dev` to test functions.
